name: hyper-mcp
description: A fast, secure MCP server that extends its capabilities through WebAssembly plugins
long_description:
hyper-mcp is a fast, secure MCP server whose tools come from sandboxed WebAssembly plugins. Plugins are distributed as OCI images, local files, HTTP(S) URLs, or S3 objects and run with fine-grained network, filesystem, and memory limits.

This bundle ships the hyper-mcp binary only. You must provide a config file that lists the plugins to load (see the `config_file` setting below). An example config lives at https://github.com/hyper-mcp-rs/hyper-mcp/blob/main/config.example.json.

Note: loading `oci://` plugins requires the `cosign` CLI on your PATH for signature verification. If you only use `file://`, `http(s)://`, or `s3://` plugins you do not need cosign. You can bypass OCI signature verification by enabling "Skip OCI signature verification" below, but this is not recommended.

config_file.title: Plugin config file
config_file.description: Path to your hyper-mcp config (JSON or YAML) listing the WebAssembly plugins to load. See config.example.json in the repository.

dynamic_loading.title: Enable dynamic plugin loading
dynamic_loading.description: Allow loading and unloading plugins at runtime via the hyper_mcp-load_plugin and hyper_mcp-unload_plugin tools.

insecure_skip_signature.title: Skip OCI signature verification
insecure_skip_signature.description: Not recommended. Loads oci:// plugins without verifying their cosign signature, so you do not need the cosign CLI installed.
